item.title: [Latent Space] Marc Andreessen introspects on The Death of the Browser, Pi + OpenClaw, and Why "This Time Is Different"
item.description: Speaker 1 | 00:00 - 00:25 Something about AI that causes the people in the field, I would say, to become both excessively utopian and excessively apocalyptic. Having said that, I think what's actually happened is an enormous amount of technical progress that built up over time. And like for for example, we now know the neural network is the correct architecture. And I I will tell you, like, was a sixty year run where that was like a, you know, or even seventy years where that was controversial. ...
